hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB providers into a unified workflow that preserves audit evidence and supports risk-based onboarding decisions for directors and shareholders.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit evidence gaps slow director reviews
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to preserve a clear and complete audit trail for director and shareholder onboarding reviews. This makes it difficult to trace decisions, demonstrate due diligence and prepare for regulatory or audit inspections.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects director and shareholder checks, reviewer actions, decision logs and supporting documents into one structured workflow to deliver complete, traceable onboarding evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to director review
workflow_description: SFTY structures KYC and KYB provider outputs into risk-based workflows that preserve audit evidence for director and shareholder compliance review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for director and shareholder review?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures director and shareholder reviews by connecting KYB and risk screening outputs into controlled workflows with decision logs and audit-grade evidence preservation.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY preserves all review actions, provider results, decisions and evidence in a traceable audit trail for defensible onboarding and compliance reporting purposes.
faq_3_question: Can SFTY connect multiple KYB providers?
faq_3_answer: Yes, SFTY orchestrates multiple KYB providers by aggregating their outputs and routing reviews based on risk, jurisdiction or business logic.
faq_4_question: How does SFTY fit into onboarding workflows?
faq_4_answer: SFTY integrates provider outputs into onboarding workflows, applying internal policies, routing reviews, recording decisions and preparing evidence and reports.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing KYC and KYB providers and turns their outputs into structured workflows without replacing them.
final_title: Preserve audit-ready evidence for director reviews
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into structured workflows for director and shareholder onboarding evidence.
